description_long: This chapel is a stone structure with a steeply pitched, gray gabled roof and pointed Gothic arches throughout its design. The front facade features three tall, narrow, pointed-arch windows with blue-tinted glass, flanked by two slender towers topped with spires. The side walls are lined with a series of tall, pointed-arch windows and buttresses, each window framed by stone tracery. The rear of the chapel has a simpler design, with two small arched windows and a single tall window, as well as additional spires at the corners. The main entrance is a rounded arch doorway set into a recessed porch, with a wooden door and stone steps leading up to it. The overall appearance is reminiscent of 19th-century Gothic Revival architecture, with an emphasis on verticality and ornate stonework.
description: A gray stone Gothic Revival chapel with tall pointed-arch windows, spires, and a steep gabled roof. The front features a grand entrance and large stained glass windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a rounded arch doorway, three large pointed-arch stained glass windows above, and two tall spired towers flanking the facade.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a row of tall, narrow pointed-arch windows separated by buttresses, and the full length of the steeply pitched roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two small arched windows, a single tall window, and corner spires, with a simpler and less ornate design compared to the front.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same sequence of pointed-arch windows and buttresses along the wall.
attribute_stained_glass_windows: Yes, the front facade features three large pointed-arch stained glass windows with blue-tinted glass. No specific imagery is visible, but the windows are a prominent decorative element.
attribute_steeple_or_bell_tower: The chapel has four slender spires, two on the front corners and two at the rear, but no central steeple or bell tower is present.
attribute_entrance_door_design: The main entrance door is a rounded archway set in a recessed stone porch, made of wood and colored brown. It is simple in design, with no visible ornate carvings or decorative elements.
